# Gcore Edge Proxy

- [Overview](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/overview.md): Deploy DDoS protection using Gcore CDN edge infrastructure with Anycast IP addresses, PoP-based traffic filtering, and translation rules for origin servers.
- [Setup and configuration](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/setup-and-configuration.md): Configure Edge Proxy with origin IP, port, protocol (TCP/UDP), and application type to create protected endpoints for game servers and applications.
- [FAQs and trobleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/faqs-and-trobleshooting.md): Resolve common Edge Proxy issues: DDoS protection setup, TCP/UDP application configuration, DNS updates, Anycast IP assignment, and connection troubleshooting.
